title: EXCEPT returns non-empty result for identical floating-point division queries with INT columns
description:
## Bug Report

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```sql
CREATE TABLE t1(c INT);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1);
SELECT c / 3 FROM t1 EXCEPT SELECT c / 3 FROM t1;
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

Empty set

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
```
+--------+
| c / 3  |
+--------+
| 0.3333 |
+--------+
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

```
tiup playground nightly --host 0.0.0.0 --kv 3 --tiflash 3
```
```
8.0.11-TiDB-v9.0.0-beta.2.pre-384-g5fab436
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a FLOAT, b INT);
SELECT a / b FROM t2 WHERE a / b NOT IN (SELECT a / b FROM t2);
CREATE TABLE t3(x DECIMAL(10, 5), y VARCHAR(10));
key_bug_features: EXCEPT with identical floating-point division queries returns non-empty result
